responsibilities: Extract, clean, and analyze data from multiple sources to answer key business questions accurately
Build and maintain recurring reports and dashboards that track operational and business performance metrics
Write efficient SQL queries to aggregate and join data across relational databases and data warehouses
Conduct exploratory data analysis to identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in business datasets
Present analytical findings and actionable recommendations to stakeholders through clear visualizations and summaries
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand data needs and translate them into analytical deliverables
Validate data accuracy and consistency across reports, flagging and resolving discrepancies proactively
Support ad hoc analysis requests with quick turnaround to inform time-sensitive business decisions
Document data definitions, calculation methodologies, and report logic for organizational knowledge sharing
Identify opportunities to automate repetitive reporting tasks and streamline analytics workflows
